rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Harley Davidson, Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to written discovery and request for sanctions is granted. Plaintiffs failed to respond to Harley Davidson, Inc.'s Set Two Interrogatories sufficiently. In their response, Plaintiffs did not reference or summarize the documents they now wish to provide in lieu of a response. Harley Davidson reasonably rejected Plaintiffs offer of providing all of their responses to discovery propounded by all other defendants in this case. Plaintiffs are to provide further responses to Set Two Interrogatories. Sanctions against Plaintiffs will be imposed. If a hearing is requested, it will be heard at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)
